channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Untaxed vehicle, 15th March
item.description:
Been abandoned

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Denbridge Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin bag dumped on grass verge, Barnesdale Crescent, 15th March
item.description:
This bag has been here for a few weeks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1,3, Barnesdale Crescent, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on pump room in front of Thetford Court on Sydenham Hill estate, 15th March
item.description:
Graffiti on pump room in front of Thetford Court on Sydenham Hill estate

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lapse Wood Walk, Dulwich, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping on corner of Frederick Pl and Crescent Rd, 15th March
item.description:
Started building up late at night when it was dark between 8-10pm Friday 13 March. Needs clearing.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Frederick Place, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass bottle on corner of Robin Hood Green, 15th March
item.description:
The glass bottle appears to have been smashed on Friday night

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 61, Friar Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wooden thing, 15th March
item.description:
Dumped for a couple of weeks now.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kirkton Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pile of dead pigeons, 15th March
item.description:
About 10 dead bloodied pigeons dumped just inside gate ( about 30 ft in)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hurst Place, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This whole street needs attention., 15th March
item.description:
Abdomen vehicles, no reg plates, smashed windows. Bags of rubble. Sign posts.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Turnham Road, Brockley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken freezer on pavement, 15th March
item.description:
There is a freezer on the pavement.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rookwood Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 15th March
item.description:
Abandoned van not moved at least 2 months. Number plate only on dashboard. On double yellow lines. Could being used as an old parts store room as other vans with foreign number plates often being repaired around it ? Close to the girls school entrance.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Floathaven Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More furniture dumped, 15th March
item.description:
Furniture dumped draws and bed items and a shopping trolley
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jowett Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed dumped, 15th March
item.description:
A man stopped in a van and dumped a bed frame and mattress on the footpath blocking the pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Jowett Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Burnt recycling bin, 15th March
item.description:
Hi, Some idiot set a recycling bin on fire and it’s melted on the pavement. There’s also glass all over it he pavement too. Could someone come clean it up please? Many thanks, Ada

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38a, Kellett Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 15th March
item.description:
It's been sitting there for some time. Looks awful, thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nickelby Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubish strewn across pavement, 15th March
item.description:
Rubish strewn across pavement
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westmount Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Part of tree fallen down, 15th March
item.description:
Part of tree fallen down on pavement also please remove the flag that is tangled up in this tree outside no.361 sutherland avenue Thankyou

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sutherland Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubish strewn across pavement, 15th March
item.description:
Rubish strewn across pavement
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westmount Road, Eltham

item.title: Litter bins full and overflowing, 15th March
item.description:
Litter bins full and overflowing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 397-399, Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dishwasher been dumped, 15th March
item.description:
Once again something has been dumped at the top of our road. This is happening on a weekly basis, and I always have to report it. The first time I reported it i actually gave you the house number. It's seems to be either the shop on croydon road or the flats above the shops, ie, near the kebab shop on croydon road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Langley Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped in street, 15th March
item.description:
Rubbish dumped in street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lower Clapton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
